case_title: LUIS HERNANDEZ VS. ARIEL PADILLA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WARRIOR OF JESUS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT ARIEL PADILLA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WARRIOR OF JESUS P.D. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
